title: deps-guard configuration
description: Configuration file for deps-guard — blocks outdated dependencies before running scripts.

$schema.description: Points to the JSON Schema that describes this file.

critical.description: Packages that trigger exit code 1 when outdated, blocking the pipeline.

items.description: Package name as it appears in package.json (e.g. "react", "@types/node").

ignore.description: Packages to silently skip — never shown in the report, never trigger a failure.

items.description: Package name as it appears in package.json.

failOn.description: Controls when deps-guard exits with code 1, blocking the next script in the pipeline.

x-enumDescriptions.critical: Exit 1 only when a package listed in 'critical' is outdated. Recommended for most projects.
x-enumDescriptions.any: Exit 1 when any outdated package is found (excluding ignored ones). Strictest mode.
x-enumDescriptions.never: Always exit 0. Useful when you want the report without blocking the pipeline.

updateType.description: Minimum semver change type to include in the report. Packages below this threshold are silently ignored.

x-enumDescriptions.patch: Report all outdated packages (1.0.0 → 1.0.1 and above). Default.
x-enumDescriptions.minor: Report minor and major updates only — skip patches (1.0.0 → 1.1.0 and above).
x-enumDescriptions.major: Report major updates only (1.0.0 → 2.0.0 and above).
